Name: Average time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE after the execution of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in cases where rejection occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variants that include both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time until Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE is followed by any approval or rejection activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in traces that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER across all variants containing both
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases that later undergo multiple rejections before final approval
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in successful variants versus variants ending in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants without any rejection versus variants with Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER after Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in non-rejected traces
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in loops preceding Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE after Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases that are later rejected by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'
